products.name: Smart Gold Nitro EA
products.desc:
Smart Gold Nitro EA

A high-frequency grid trading system built for XAUUSD (Gold) on the M1 timeframe. Smart Gold Nitro EA opens dynamic buy/sell grids that adapt to price movement, using a scaled lot-progression table to manage position sizing as the grid extends. Built-in risk controls include equity-based drawdown protection, configurable profit-taking (fixed or trailing), candle-based stop-loss trailing, and customizable trading-hour restrictions. Ideal for traders looking for a fully automated, always-on approach to Gold's volatility.

Requirements: Minimum $1000 deposit (Cent account), MT5, VPS recommended for 24/5 operation.

authorizedAccounts.note: Jordi Telegrame paid 50usd for one account   @jordi8947
